summary: An installment of the recurring 'Last Week at DHS' roundup that strings together unrelated agency news items, each as a still or slow B-roll shot under a paragraph of explanatory caption text: Biden's announcement on lawful pathways, a Juneteenth flag-raising ceremony, a Coast Guard all-hands at Patrol Forces Southwest Asia, and a Border Patrol K-9 weapons seizure in Blythe, CA. Although a background bed gives it a high music score, it is an informational newsletter-style digest with descriptive text cards rather than a stylized, youth-appeal, music-driven genre piece, so out of scope.
notable_text: President Biden announced new actions to expand lawful pathways and keep families together; DHS recognized Juneteenth by hosting a first-ever flag raising ceremony; A U.S. Border Patrol K-9 alerted at a Blythe, California gas station leading to the discovery of 25 AK-47 style rifles
